title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: A Google Cloud tutorial on building AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Looker, grounded in enterprise data. Covers the Model Context Protocol (MCP), MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, Looker API setup, and Python environment configuration for creating agents that translate prompts into data requests.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through configuring a first AI agent with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, grounded in enterprise data. It covers the Model Context Protocol (MCP), the MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, Looker API setup, and Python environment setup. The result is an agent that translates natural-language prompts into Looker data requests.
